identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

project.name: BlackieFi
project.target_audience: High-Net-Worth Individuals, Crypto Whales, Aesthetic-Conscious Users

headings.usage: Page titles, Hero text, Major section headers

body.usage: UI text, Data tables, Buttons, Inputs

mono.usage: Financial data, Transaction IDs, Code snippets

spacing.scale: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. Gap-6 or Gap-8 for grids.

layout_strategy.alignment: Optical alignment. Left align text. Center align only for dramatic hero statements.

visual_enhancers: Subtle glow on charts and key metrics
Uppercase, tracked-out labels (tracking-widest) for section headers

Button.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-600 to-yellow-500 text-black font-bold hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-md
Button.secondary: bg-transparent border border-yellow-600/30 text-yellow-500 hover:border-yellow-500 hover:bg-yellow-500/10 transition-all duration-300 rounded-md
Button.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-300 rounded-md

Card.base: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 rounded-xl overflow-hidden relative

Input.base: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:border-yellow-500/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-yellow-500/50 rounded-md

Chart.style: Minimalist. Remove grid lines where possible. Use gradients for area fills.

images.description: Dark marble texture for section backgrounds or sidebar
Molten gold splash for Login/Register page hero background
Wavy gold pattern for card backgrounds or banners

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px. Color: #D4AF37 (Gold) for active, #A3A3A3 (Grey) for inactive.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE CSS VARIABLES: Replace the contents of /app/frontend/src/App.css (or index.css) with the new color palette variables defined in this JSON.
2. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import link to the HTML head or CSS file.
3. TAILWIND CONFIG: Extend the tailwind.config.js theme with the new colors (gold, obsidian, silver) and font families.
4. SHADCN THEME: Override default Shadcn radius and colors to match the 'Luxury' aesthetic (Radius: 0.5rem, Primary: Gold).
5. LAYOUT: Implement the Dashboard using the 'Bento Grid' strategy.
6. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute.
7. IMAGES: Use the provided image URLs for backgrounds. Do not use placeholders.
8. NOISE TEXTURE: Add a global noise texture overlay if possible for that 'film grain' premium feel.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
